package_description: Operational tuning of auxiliary systems, controls, and maintenance on the incumbent thermal-heavy grid method.
rollout_limit_notes: Keep the package modest and incumbent-only. Auxiliary-load tuning is operationally plausible but not universally persistent, and it becomes less relevant as incumbent thermal activity shrinks.
evidence_summary: Auxiliary-load optimisation is the only accepted electricity package because AEMO treats auxiliary use as a distinct operational component and the current incumbent method explicitly carries direct thermal-fuel inputs.
derivation_method: Apply a low-single-digit fuel multiplier and proportional energy-emissions reduction on the incumbent thermal mix only so the package remains much smaller than the frontier-method pathway change.
review_notes: Do not apply to policy-frontier or deep-clean-firmed methods.
